text.title: SQL Optimization Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.note: baseline_plan missing actual_rows + buffers; applied_change not in enum; after_plan empty; sample_size missing (must be >=1).

list.pattern: Index added 'because it might help'; no measurable improvement; index later dropped.
Planner picks nested-loop on 1M rows; new index does nothing.
Composite index on (created_at, tenant_id); tenant_id equality query does seq scan.
